items.title: pytest — Fixtures
items.note: Complete reference for fixtures, scopes, `conftest.py`, parametrization.

items.title: Martin Fowler — Mocks Aren't Stubs
items.note: Classic essay distinguishing the different kinds of test double (Meszaros taxonomy).

items.title: freezegun — controlling time in tests
items.note: Library for freezing `datetime.now()` and `time.time()` in tests; ideal for backoff/timeout logic.
